zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues VI d'Auxy於1233年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯奧勒-a奧時，他的父親Hughes IV d'Auxy39歲，母親Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu28歲。他與Marie de Rubempré結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1280年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues VI d'Auxy于1233年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯奧勒-a奧时，他的父亲Hughes IV d'Auxy39岁，母亲Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu28岁。他与Marie de Rubempré结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1280年在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues VI d'Auxy was born in 1233, in Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Hughes IV d'Auxy, was 39 and his mother, Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu, was 28. He married Marie de Rubempré. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in 1280, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues VI d'Auxy est né en 1233, à Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hughes IV d'Auxy, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Rubempré. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1280, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues VI d'Auxy 1233 in Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hughes IV d'Auxy 39 und seine Mutter Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu 28. Er hat Marie de Rubempré geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1280 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues VI d'Auxy è nato il nel 1233 nel Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Hughes IV d'Auxy, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Rubempré. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1280, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues VI d'Auxyが1233年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスアウクシ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Hughes IV d'Auxyは39歳，母Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieuは28歳であった。Marie de Rubempréと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1280年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues VI d'Auxy(이)가 1233년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아라스 오스이-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hughes IV d'Auxy(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Marie de Rubempré(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1280년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues VI d'Auxy nasceu em 1233, em Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hughes IV d'Auxy, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Rubempré. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1280, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues VI d'Auxy родился в 1233 г. в местности аукси-ле-чaто, аррас, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Hughes IV d'Auxy было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Rubempré. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1280 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues VI d'Auxy nació en 1233, en Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hughes IV d'Auxy, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mabille de Crécy-en-Ponthieu, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Marie de Rubempré. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1280, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
